reasoning: This workout targets your primary limiter: lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Considering your last ride's extended rest, we'll approach with reduced intensity to re-establish rhythm. This is crucial for the Alpine Loop where consistent power during extended climbs is essential.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 sets of 6-minute over-unders: 2 mins at 218W, 2 mins at 245W, 2 mins at 218W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
